description: A calm elegant mechanical painted stork Codex pet inspired by Machinarium, with a very long yellow-orange beak, white body feathers, black patterned wing feathers, soft pink tail gradient, orange bare head skin, and slender pale pink legs.

idle.notes: Quiet standing loop with a slow blink, soft feather motion, and a tiny beak adjustment.

blink.notes: Uses the idle row, which already contains the subtle blink cycle.

walk.notes: Graceful high-step walking loop with explicit right-facing and left-facing rows.

happy.notes: Soft feather bloom, gentle tail flutter, and a light chirp-like beak opening.

sleep.notes: One-leg resting sleep with a tucked neck, beak close to the body, and fluffed feathers.

curious.notes: Curious ground-inspection loop with a natural S-curve neck and lowered beak.

fly.notes: A short graceful lift with wing spread, reading as a delicate takeoff flutter.

damaged.notes: Gentle deflated posture with a lowered beak and inward-settling feathers.

busy.notes: Quiet maintenance cycle as Vermora tidies its chest feathers with its beak.
